title: Medieval Mentality
description: It´s a fun little Modpack with Create and a lot of things to explore and bosses to fight.
body:
# Medieval Mentality

The Medieval Mentality modpack aims to improve the vanilla minecraft experience, with around 130 mods improving the game, but still feeling vanilla. Thanks to countless hours of research, I have been able to improve the performance so everyone can enjoy the modpack.

MM was made with creativity, multiplayer and visuals in mind.This means that there are many shaders to choose from which already come preinstalled, also one ressource pack is included - you can add more if you feel like it. Essential is also installed so you can play with your friends. 

With Create and the other mods installed you can build anything you could think of. This also means your creativity is the limit, and the source of your builds.
## Features
- 🌲 Biomes - Explore 25+ New Biomes
- 🍖 Food - Enjoy the different kind of food added by Farmer's Delight
- 🍁 Seasons - prepare for winter & check your crops
- 🏡 Settle - explore & protect your goods against enemy forces
- ♟️ Bosses - more than 10+ unique boss fights to defeat
- 🎒 Backpacks - store goods in drawers or use portable backpacks
- 🔨 Upgrade - Upgrade tools and armor to better netherite
- 📦 Chest - Store lots of items using "iron chests"
- 🪑 Furniture - decorate with "MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod"
- 🦖 Wildlife - Around 90 new mobs to tame and fight
- ✨ Decorate - various blocks from Rechiseled

Ressoure Pack:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
